requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Requirements for EV Chargers — Romania (ANRE / 230 V 50 Hz)
requirement_topic.zh: 电动汽车充电设备并网要求——罗马尼亚（ANRE / 230 V 50 Hz）
requirement_topic.zht: 電動汽車充電設備並網要求——羅馬尼亞（ANRE / 230 V 50 Hz）

summary.en: EV chargers connecting to the Romanian grid must comply with EN IEC 61851-1:2019 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system – Part 1: General requirements, adopted as SR EN IEC 61851-1 by ASRO) for AC charging modes (Mode 2, Mode 3). DC fast chargers additionally require EN IEC 61851-23:2023 (Part 23: DC EV charging station). Grid connection for higher-power chargers (>3.7 kW single-phase or >11 kW three-phase) requires compliance with ANRE Order No. 30/2013 (CRED) and, for large DC fast chargers, Transelectrica CTET interconnection approval. The Romanian grid operates at 230/400 V 50 Hz; Chinese 220/380 V domestic standards require re-parameterisation.
summary.zh: 接入罗马尼亚电网的电动汽车充电设备，交流充电模式（Mode 2、Mode 3）须符合EN IEC 61851-1:2019（电动汽车传导充电系统——第1部分：一般要求，ASRO采标为SR EN IEC 61851-1）。直流快充设备还须符合EN IEC 61851-23:2023（第23部分：直流电动汽车充电站）。较大功率充电设备（单相>3.7 kW或三相>11 kW）的并网须符合ANRE第30/2013号令（CRED），大型直流快充设备还须获得Transelectrica CTET并网审批。罗马尼亚电网运行电压为230/400 V、50 Hz；中国国内220/380 V标准须重新参数化。
summary.zht: 接入羅馬尼亞電網的電動汽車充電設備，交流充電模式（Mode 2、Mode 3）須符合EN IEC 61851-1:2019（電動汽車傳導充電系統——第1部分：一般要求，ASRO採標為SR EN IEC 61851-1）。直流快充設備還須符合EN IEC 61851-23:2023（第23部分：直流電動汽車充電站）。較大功率充電設備（單相>3.7 kW或三相>11 kW）的並網須符合ANRE第30/2013號令（CRED），大型直流快充設備還須獲得Transelectrica CTET並網審批。羅馬尼亞電網運行電壓為230/400 V、50 Hz；中國國內220/380 V標準須重新參數化。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61851-1:2019 / SR EN IEC 61851-1 (ASRO adoption) — Electric vehicle conductive charging system – General requirements
EN IEC 61851-23:2023 / SR EN IEC 61851-23 (ASRO adoption) — DC EV charging station
ANRE Order No. 30/2013 — Codul tehnic al rețelei electrice de distribuție (CRED)
Transelectrica — Codul tehnic al rețelei electrice de transport (CTET)

summary.en: GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system – Part 1: General requirements, superseding GB/T 18487.1-2015) is the primary Chinese standard for EV charger grid connection and safety. It is calibrated to China's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid and GB/T 20234 connector system. GB/T 18487.1 does not address Romania's 230/400 V nominal voltage, EN IEC 61851-1 Mode 3 control pilot requirements, ANRE CRED provisions, or Transelectrica CTET interconnection requirements.
summary.zh: GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统——第1部分：一般要求，取代GB/T 18487.1-2015）是中国电动汽车充电设备并网和安全的主要标准，针对中国220/380 V、50 Hz电网和GB/T 20234连接器体系进行了校准。GB/T 18487.1不涵盖罗马尼亚230/400 V名义电压、EN IEC 61851-1 Mode 3控制引导要求、ANRE CRED条款或Transelectrica CTET并网要求。
summary.zht: GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統——第1部分：一般要求，取代GB/T 18487.1-2015）是中國電動汽車充電設備並網和安全的主要標準，針對中國220/380 V、50 Hz電網和GB/T 20234連接器體系進行了校準。GB/T 18487.1不涵蓋羅馬尼亞230/400 V名義電壓、EN IEC 61851-1 Mode 3控制引導要求、ANRE CRED條款或Transelectrica CTET並網要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system – Part 1: General requirements (recommended national standard)

gap.en: Chinese EV chargers certified only to GB/T 18487.1 are not validated for EN IEC 61851-1 (SR EN) Mode 3 control pilot, EN IEC 61851-23 DC fast charging, ANRE CRED, or Transelectrica CTET grid-interconnection requirements. Voltage re-parameterisation from 220/380 V to 230/400 V is required. Romanian-language grid-connection application documentation is required by ANRE and DNOs. AFIR ad-hoc payment and OCPP requirements add further software/hardware demands beyond grid standards.
gap.zh: 仅依据GB/T 18487.1认证的中国电动汽车充电设备，未经EN IEC 61851-1（SR EN）Mode 3控制引导、EN IEC 61851-23直流快充、ANRE CRED或Transelectrica CTET并网要求验证。须将电压从220/380 V重新参数化至230/400 V。ANRE和配电网运营商要求提供罗马尼亚语并网申请文件。AFIR即时付款和OCPP要求在电网标准之外还增加了软硬件需求。
gap.zht: 僅依據GB/T 18487.1認證的中國電動汽車充電設備，未經EN IEC 61851-1（SR EN）Mode 3控制引導、EN IEC 61851-23直流快充、ANRE CRED或Transelectrica CTET並網要求驗證。須將電壓從220/380 V重新參數化至230/400 V。ANRE和配電網運營商要求提供羅馬尼亞語並網申請文件。AFIR即時付款和OCPP要求在電網標準之外還增加了軟硬件需求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN IEC 61851-1 (SR EN) is a harmonised standard under LVD for EV chargers in Romania. ANRE CRED and Transelectrica CTET are mandatory national grid codes.
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487.1-2023 is a recommended (推荐性) national standard. Compliance is effectively required by State Grid and Southern Grid connection rules within China.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese EV chargers certified only to GB/T 18487.1 are NOT compliant for Romanian grid connection or EU CE marking. Re-testing to EN IEC 61851-1 (SR EN) and EN IEC 61851-23 (for DC), voltage re-parameterisation to 230/400 V, and ANRE/Transelectrica documentation are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅依据GB/T 18487.1认证的中国电动汽车充电设备不符合罗马尼亚并网要求或欧盟CE标志要求。须按EN IEC 61851-1（SR EN）和EN IEC 61851-23（直流）重新测试，将电压重新参数化至230/400 V，并准备ANRE/Transelectrica所需文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅依據GB/T 18487.1認證的中國電動汽車充電設備不符合羅馬尼亞並網要求或歐盟CE標誌要求。須按EN IEC 61851-1（SR EN）和EN IEC 61851-23（直流）重新測試，將電壓重新參數化至230/400 V，並準備ANRE/Transelectrica所需文件。
